title: selago pusilla
intro: Selago pusilla, also known as Dwarf Blue Bottle or Blue Bottle, is a low-growing, succulent perennial plant native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and support immune function. Selago pusilla can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or topical cream, and is often used in traditional medicine to address various health issues.
